PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PRODIGY MANAGEMENT
INSTRUCTIONS AND FORM (WRIT) MAILED TO PLAINTIFF; PLEASE SEE FILE
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PRODIGY MANAGEMENT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,524.00 FILED BY LAWSON, CHRISTINA AS TO DEFENDANT PRODIGY MANAGEMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-11-1998 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
FORM FOR WRIT AND INSTRUCTIONS TO SHERIFF FORM MAILED TO PLTFF.PER HER WRITTEN REQUEST.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAWSON, CHRISTINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRODIGY MANAGEMENT $600.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $646.00, DEFENDANT LARSEN, ALLEN IS DISMISSED AS AN INDIVIDUAL, STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
